description: Composition Grey round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbing around neckline and graphic on the front Wash care Machine wash in warm water with like colours Use only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry on low Do not iron on print Do not dry clean Timeless and classic, just like the beatles themselves, this T-shirt celebrates the 60's rock legends with its distressed beatles print on the front. Flaunt your taste in music and fashion with this vintage tee. Wear it with distressed jeans to pull off a retro chic, Beatles style. Size & FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size M
